title: Custom Item Durability Bar (CIDB)
description: Change colors of item durability bar to what you like!
body:
Did you want to change color of item durability?
CIDB (abbreviated from Custom Item Durability Bar) allows you to do not only that, but also make it twinkle at selected durability with selectable color through config!

<details>
<summary>Guide</summary>
This guide is here to help you with configure mod to how you like it.

If you don't have imagination to create your own custom bar, use presets in bottom of config screen. Check bottom of this guide to know what presets are. 
  
## Colors
  
### Durability Colors
A list of colors. They're used for color of durability bar (how unexpected!).

**Warning!** Color doesn't changes by HUE rotation. If you want from green to red, and expected yellow, it will be orange. Add yellow in middle of list if you want it.

### Durability Flickering Color
When durability of item is critical (Check Parameters), durabiltiy bar will flick with selected color.

### Durability Bar Color Style (since 0.2.1)
Vanilla - vanilla.

Rainbow - Color changes with time. Speed is taken from Durability Flickering Speed.

Gradient - bar is now gradient. Doesn't affect Text Styles.

### Full/Empty Bundle Bar Color
As name says, those are used for bundle bar.

### Unique Item Color List (since 0.2.0)
If item in that map, mod will use spesified color, that were connected with item. Same color issue as in Durability Colors.

## Parameters

### Flickering Durability
If enabled, durability bar will flicker if durability is critical.

### Increasing Durability bar on Critical
If enabled: as close bar is to critical point, bar will increase to maximum.

### Durability Bar Style
Horizontal - vanilla, Vertical - well, vertical.

Absolute - displays durability as text, with short scales.

Percent - displays durability as text by percent.

### Critical Percent
A part of durability, which considered critical. 50% - half, 25% - 1/4 of full.

## Presets (since 0.2.1)

### Rainbow style
Bar will be change with colors of rainbow with time.

### Item style
Bar of item will depend on color of material (wood - brown, iron - white).

Suggest your own presets/styles on github of project! 
</details>



Requires [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) only for versions 0.1.0 and 0.0.1.
